mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pi.student_id) AS total_students FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_papers FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status = 'auditing'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS reviewed_papers FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status IN ('completed', 'rejected')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS passed_papers FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status = 'completed'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS submitted_papers FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.submit_time IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS auditing_papers FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status = 'auditing'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_papers FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status = 'rejected'

SELECT pi.paper_status as status, COUNT(*) as count, CASE pi.paper_status WHEN 'pending' THEN '待分配' WHEN 'assigned' THEN '已分配' WHEN 'checking' THEN '查重中' WHEN 'auditing' THEN '待审核' WHEN 'completed' THEN '审核通过' WHEN 'rejected' THEN '审核不通过' WHEN 'withdrawn' THEN '已撤回' ELSE pi.paper_status END as statusName FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY pi.paper_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT su.major as majorName, COUNT(*) as totalPapers, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as passedPapers, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejectedPapers, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'auditing' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as auditingPapers FROM paper_info pi JOIN sys_user su ON pi.student_id = su.id WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND su.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY su.major ORDER BY totalPapers DESC

SELECT DATE(pi.submit_time) as date, COUNT(*) as submitCount, SUM(CASE WHEN pi.paper_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completeCount FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.submit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND pi.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(pi.submit_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT pi.id as paperId, pi.paper_title as paperTitle, su.real_name as studentName, pi.paper_status as status, pi.check_time as operateTime, CASE pi.paper_status WHEN 'completed' THEN '审核通过' WHEN 'rejected' THEN '审核不通过' ELSE '未知操作' END as operateType FROM paper_info pi JOIN sys_user su ON pi.student_id = su.id WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.paper_status IN ('completed', 'rejected') AND pi.check_time IS NOT NULL AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND su.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY pi.check_time DESC LIMIT #{page.offset}, #{page.size}
SELECT DISTINCT pi.student_id FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS new_submissions FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.submit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pi.student_id) AS inactive_students FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.student_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT pi2.student_id FROM paper_info pi2 WHERE pi2.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi2.is_deleted = 0 AND pi2.submit_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) )
SELECT COUNT(*) AS today_reviews FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(pi.check_time) = CURDATE() AND pi.paper_status IN ('completed', 'rejected')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS today_passes FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(pi.check_time) = CURDATE() AND pi.paper_status = 'completed'

SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, pi.submit_time, pi.check_time)) AS avg_review_time FROM paper_info pi WHERE pi.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND pi.is_deleted = 0 AND pi.paper_status IN ('completed', 'rejected') AND pi.submit_time IS NOT NULL AND pi.check_time IS NOT NULL
